prompt: For a protein engineering research program, construct variants of IDH1 (Enzyme) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. detail a computational workflow covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: IDH1; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
